title: Email Authentication
description: Email Authentication documents authentication material for Email in the protocol domain. It is classified as a specification page for the application-protocol class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Sender Policy FrameworkSPF, Domain Keys Identified MailDKIM, and Domain-based Message Authentication Reporting and Conformance DMARC, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include authentication, email authentication, and protocol, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is protocol / email / authentication, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
